title: Canadian mortgage-renewal pressure components
description: Mortgage-interest cost, the policy rate, and household debt service are a multi-indicator diagnostic, not a single housing-stress score.
plainLanguageSummary: Mortgage-interest cost, the policy rate, and household debt service are a multi-indicator diagnostic, not a single housing-stress score.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: Mortgage-interest cost, the policy rate, and household debt service are a multi-indicator diagnostic, not a single housing-stress score.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: Mortgage-interest cost, the policy rate, and household debt service are a multi-indicator diagnostic, not a single housing-stress score.

methodology.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
methodology.notes: Mortgage-interest cost, the policy rate, and household debt service are a multi-indicator diagnostic, not a single housing-stress score.
